return_value_origin.detail: Return value 'formatted' originates from FormatResult child call, which is acceptable.

child_coverage.detail: All children (ParseInput, PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder, FormatResult) are directly called in the parent code.

no_direct_access.detail: No direct reads or writes to global variables or data sources; all data operations go through child calls.

no_cross_calls.detail: No child calls another child; all calls are from parent to child.

dataflow_conformance.detail: All declared dataflow edges are realized: parent input to ParseInput, ParseInput outputs to parent, parent payload to PlaceOrder/CancelOrder/TrackOrder, their results to parent, parent result to FormatResult, FormatResult output to parent return.
